---
name: Workflow Request
about: Suggest a new automation workflow
title: "[Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to automate?**
A clear description of the task or process.

**What tools/APIs would it use?**
e.g., Gmail, Slack, OpenAI, Google Sheets

**Who would use this?**
e.g., marketers, developers, freelancers

**Any additional context?**
Links, examples, or references.
